page_metadata.biotools__summary: NOrMAL (NucleOsome Mapping ALgorithm) is a command line tool for accurate placing of the nucleosomes. It was designed to resolve overlapping nucleosomes and extract extra information (“fuzziness”, probability, etc.) of nucleosome placement.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: NOrMAL (NucleOsome Mapping ALgorithm) is a command line tool for accurate placing of the nucleosomes. It was designed to resolve overlapping nucleosomes and extract extra information (“fuzziness”, probability, etc.) of nucleosome placement.
